gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/83)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/83)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى يَا عِبَادِيَ الصِّدِّيقِينَ تَنَعَّمُوا بِعِبَادَتِي فِي الدُّنْيَا فَإِنَّكُمْ تَتَنَعَّمُونَ بِهَا فِي الْآخِرَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Abu Jameela who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High Said: “O My<sup>azwj</sup> servants, the truthful ones! Enjoy with My<sup>azwj</sup> worship in the world, so you would be enjoying with it in the Hereafter’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from abu Jamilah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Allah, the Most Blessed, the Most High, has said, “O My truthful servants, enjoy the blessings of worshipping Me in this world; you will enjoy its benefits in the next life.’””
